title: The CK-Pack
description: A Pack related to the CubeKrowd-Minecraft-Server containing Features in the colours of the Server such as GUI-Textures, Mobs, Font and a Custom Language that replaces all hard c's and k's with 'ck' and tweaks Subtitles.
body:
Features of the CK-Pack:

DISCLAIMER: 
This pack is actually just some random ideas thrown together so don't expect a harmonic pack at all.
This is the beta-version meaning that there may be unfinished contents/mistakes
Also notice that this pack may not be optimal for players with colour blindess!

Block textures and models
- TALLCAKE is back in 3D! (block modell of the cake)
- Most Chiseled Blocks have a chance to show the Face of very well-known CK'ers/Admins instead (2%) :
 - Diamondblock = LogicBugs
 - Chiseled Sandstone = MBoose
 - Chiseled Netherbricks = Cubehamster
 - Chiseled Blackstone = JL2579
 - Chiseled Stonebricks = sad_dog
 - Red Chiseled Sandstone = LearnRedstone
 - Chiseled Deepslate = Weeksly
- Redstone Components that are used in MW are now 'CK-approved' (TNT, Slimeblocks, Honeyblocks, (Sticky) Piston, Observer)
- Grass Blocks have a small chance to become a CraftyMasterman
- Sculk Shriekers with a cyan dot in the middle can_summon Wardens
- Waxed Blocks have now a small Indicator in the top right Corner
- Sticky Piston Arm
- Dispensers and Droppers now got Arrows on the side faces telling you in which direction they face (white = dropper, black = dispenser)
- Observers have now arrows on their sides visualizing their direction and whether they are triggered or not
- Lever have now a small red indicator for ON/OFF
- Piston Head Texture now more similar to JL's Skin-Face

Mobs:
- Enderman → Brownie1111
- Iron Golems → TheCMaxGuy
- Turtles → Lekro
- Clerics → jan-like
- Fletcher → AntOfThy
- TALLPUP → wolf
- Wandering Trader → JohnStar128
- Drowned → TraksAG
- Zombies are Zombie3597
- Husk → SuperCoxylac
- Vex → zorua162
- Vindicator → SoloSwain
- Evoker → DarkKronicle
- Polar Bear → Daluuu
- GlowSquids → GlowSquibs
- Jane is piloting the Enderdragon

Other Features:
- New language "CubeKrowdian Accent" that you can find in the languages menu (replaces hard c's and k's with 'ck' + some small easter eggs) => might actualy be removed as it is a bit annoying for searching items
- a bunch of splashes (warning: bad jokes/puns)
- Shield has now a CK-ified texture and a fancier frame
- Smoother Sun and Moon
- New Font! (slightly more dense)
- Subtitles now may have symbols infront indicating the source:
 - Block-Symbol for most block-sounds/actions
 - Mobs have a corresponding symbol
 - Player-Icon for Playeractions
 - Footsteps-Icon for Stepping-Sounds
- New GUI-textures (dark blue)
- New Menu-Background
- New Menu-Logo (CK-Version) made by Nettakrim
- New Main-Menu-Background (From TacoTown made by TacoSquad)
- Netherite Axes are now Ban-Hammers
- Changed Enchantment Glint
- New Pumpkin Blur (sus)
- Powder Snow is slightly easier to distinguish from normal snow now
- Changed Icons for Menu Buttons
- [req. Optifine] Lightmap that emphasizes the brightness-difference between light level >1 and 0
- [req. Optifine] Custom loading screen with CK-Emblem

This Pack was created by TheMysticalMarv (Minecraft-IGN)
For Suggestions, Criticism and Ideas you can DM me on CubeKrowd's Discord or message me on the CubeKrowd-Server (IP: play.cubekrowd.net)
Suggestions will be collected for the next version (Gamma)
